metadata.name: New Module
metadata.author: Unknown
metadata.description: The land sleeps under an enchantment. Gather the awakening crystals from the dungeons and bring them to the shrine in Amberhollow to break the spell.

towns.name: Amberhollow
towns.description: A walled outpost on the frontier, always on guard against the wilds.

key_dungeons.name: Forgotten Tomb
key_dungeons.description: Water seeps from the walls near Forgotten Tomb's entrance. The stone steps descend into darkness.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Venture into Forgotten Tomb and liberate the Diamond Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The artifact pulses with ancient energy.
